nasb.text: Next Moses had Aaron’s sons come near and clothed them with tunics, and girded them with sashes and bound caps on them, just as the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: And Moses brought Aaron’s sons and clothed them with coats and tied sashes around their waists and bound caps on them, as the Lord commanded Moses.

cnv.text: 摩西把亞倫的兒子帶來，給他們穿上內袍，束上腰帶，包上裹頭巾，都是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

ccb.text: 摩西又把亚伦的儿子们带来，给他们穿上内袍，束上腰带，裹上头巾，都遵照耶和华的吩咐。
